texto: Simm watched the hanging with disgust. Why would the young man pretend to be a spy when he had no skills and no natural ability? As far as he could tell there had been no secret inks, no codes, and little effort to keep his movements secret. Maybe the world was better off without such fools; fledglings who fell out of the sky only to die on the ground.
explicacao: Pergunta retórica de Dory Codington que provoca temas ligados a amor. Ao questionar “Simm watched the hanging with disgust. Why would the young man pretend to be a spy when he had no…”, o texto convida o leitor a revisar crenças sobre amor, adventure-fiction, american-revolution, com foco em termino e american-revolution.
